templateInputs.audience: World ID Proof of Human raters
templateInputs.goal: learn whether a first paid RateLoop question makes verified humans want to answer more questions
templateInputs.successSignal: A thumbs-up means the rater would answer more verified-human RateLoop questions after this. A thumbs-down means the flow, trust, reward, clarity, or timing would need to improve first.

question.title: Would you answer more paid RateLoop questions as a verified human?
question.description: Proof of Human wallets can claim the bounty. Thumbs up = you would answer more paid RateLoop questions. Thumbs down = not yet, or only if the flow changes. In feedback, name the biggest factor: reward, trust/privacy, wallet UX, clarity, settlement time, or other.
